restore.description: Restore and auto-save browser state. true uses the current session as the key; a string uses that explicit key.

restoreCheckFn.description: Optional JavaScript expression that must evaluate truthy after restore.

restoreCheckText.description: Optional page text that restored state must expose.

restoreCheckUrl.description: Optional URL pattern that restored state must match.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum time to wait for this tool call.
